channel.title: GitHub Copilot Bulletin — English / Monthly / Admins
channel.description: Latest GitHub Copilot updates for Admins (Monthly, English)

item.title: Copilot Bulletin Monthly #1 — March 2026 · Admins Edition
item.description: This month, GitHub Copilot's enterprise governance story reached a milestone. AI Controls and the agent control plane are now generally available alongside fully GA usage metrics with expanded telemetry. Combined with new multi-agent support and agentic code review, admins have a comprehensive toolkit to govern, monitor, and scale AI-assisted development across their organizations.
